title: Item Vanisher
description: Client Mod that allows you to disable/enable render of items on the ground at the toggle of a button. It is useful at times when there are a lot of items around the player, because when rendering is disabled, FPS increases.
body:
# Description
Client Fabric Mod that allows you to disable/enable render of items on the ground at the toggle of a button.

Disables rendering of items on the ground:
- Item Models
- Item HitBoxes
- Item Shadows

| Keybinding | Default key|
| ----------- | ---------- |
| Toggle Rendering | i |

![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8db9a250e3e92f7b335bc802d25808f94ea827d.png)
